channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump names David Sacks as AI, crypto czar
item.description: President-elect Trump said Thursday that venture capitalist David Sacks will serve as the White House artificial intelligence (AI) and cryptocurrency czar.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, NewsNation

item.title: House torpedoes Democratic-led effort to release Ethics report on Matt Gaetz
item.description: House Republicans on Thursday torpedoed a Democratic-led effort to release the Ethics Committee’s report on former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.), sending the resolution back to the panel.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Charlamagne tha God rips Newsom over moves to 'Trump-proof' California
item.description: Radio host Charlamagne tha God ripped California Gov. Gavin Newsom (D) over his moves to “Trump-proof” California in the weeks following the president-elect's victory.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Republicans shoot down House Dem's bid to publicize Gaetz ethics report
item.description: Democrats forced a House-wide vote on Thursday evening on whether to release an ethics report into now former Rep. Matt Gaetz.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trans rights activists stage 'bathroom sit-in' near Mike Johnson's office amid Capitol Hill restroom ban
item.description: Trans rights protesters were arrested Thursday after occupying a bathroom on Capitol Hill in Washington, D.C., over a policy barring trans people from using restrooms that match their gender identity.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ex-Proud Boys leader Enrique Tarrio delivers combative testimony in ex-cops defense
item.description: Former Proud Boys national chair Enrique Tarrio delivered combative and at times contradictory testimony Thursday as a star witness in the defense of a retired police officer accused of leaking law enforcement intel to the right-wing extremist group leader.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: An architect of Project 2025 is pressuring Republican senators to confirm Pete Hegseth
item.description: PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — The think tank behind Project 2025, the conservative blueprint linked to President-elect Donald Trump, is launching an effort to back Trump's imperiled selection for secretary of defense in its latest attempt to wield influence in the incoming Republican administration.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Another major blue city doubles down on vow to obstruct Trump’s mass deportations plan
item.description: The Boston City Council unanimously voted this week to double down on a measure designed to obstruct President-elect Trump’s plans for mass deportations.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Louisiana Treasurer John Fleming announces bid to run for U.S. Sen. Bill Cassidy's seat
item.description: BATON ROUGE, La. (AP) — Louisiana Treasurer John Fleming, a Republican and appointee of Donald Trump's during his first term as president, has announced that he will run for U.S. Senate in the hopes of unseating current member Bill Cassidy, also a Republican, who is up for reelection in 2026.
item.dc:creator: SARA CLINE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Missouri abortion ban slated to lift Friday if judge allows
item.description: A judge must decide whether “targeted regulation of abortion providers” laws are also unconstitutional under Amendment 3.
item.dc:creator: Safia Samee Ali, NewsNation

item.title: The US government is closing a women's prison and other facilities after years of abuse and decay
item.description: The Associated Press has learned that the federal Bureau of Prisons is permanently closing its “rape club” women’s prison in California and will idle six facilities in a sweeping realignment after years of abuse, decay and mismanagement.
item.dc:creator: Michael R. Sisak And Michael Balsamo, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Talking Sense: Coming together to solve tough problems
item.description: Mariah Levison and Rob Fersh help people find consensus on how to solve divisive issues, ranging from prison reform to what art should hang in the Minnesota Capitol. Learn how they do it in this MPR News Talking Sense conversation hosted by MPR News correspondent Catharine Richert.
item.dc:creator: Angela Davis, Catharine Richert, Maja Beckstrom, and Annie Baxter, MPR News

item.title: Las Vegas Mayor Shelley Berkley sworn into office; envisions future of prosperity for the city
item.description: Shelley Berkley was sworn in as the mayor of Las Vegas on Wednesday, promising to serve the city well and work with the community to create an atmosphere of growth and prosperity.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Bleakley, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump taps ex-aide Peter Navarro for senior counselor on trade and manufacturing
item.description: President-elect Trump on Wednesday named his once-jailed former aide Peter Navarro as senior counselor for trade and manufacturing to the incoming White House, picking a loyal ally to help implement broad plan for tariffs. Navarro served as White House trade adviser in Trump’s first term.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Supreme Court hears challenge to law banning gender-affirming care for trans kids
item.description: At issue is a Tennessee law that bans access to hormones, puberty blockers, and other treatments for trans kids in the state.
item.dc:creator: Nina Totenberg, MPR News

item.title: Inside RFK Jr.'s nonprofit's legal battles over vaccines and public health
item.description: The nonprofit Children's Health Defense that Kennedy led has filed nearly 30 federal and state lawsuits since 2020, many challenging vaccines and public health mandates.
item.dc:creator: Shannon Bond, MPR News

item.title: Condo deadline looms: Owners must confront years of neglect
item.description: The condo conundrum continues as the December 31st inspection deadline is only a few weeks away. State lawmakers promise action on the issue next session, but the clock is ticking.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Biden’s pardon of son Hunter threatens to tarnish legacy
item.description: President Biden’s decision to pardon his son Hunter in his final full month in the White House is threatening to erode his legacy as he prepares to leave office.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: At Supreme Court, vaping may be frowned upon, but that could change with Trump
item.description: The focal point of the case is 2009 law enacted by Congress that gives the Food and Drug Administration a mandate to curb the availability of nicotine products for minors.
item.dc:creator: Nina Totenberg, MPR News
